prestazioni: Engine: L87 6.2L EcoTec3 V8 (direct-injection, AFM/DFM deactivation) with a custom GPI Performance Stage 3 camshaft (228°/236° duration, 0.620" lift) and upgraded valve springs (Manley 26919-16) to handle 7,500 RPM safely. Pair with a Kenne Bell 3.6L Mammoth supercharger (14 psi boost) and a custom intercooler core (Vortech 801-010) for sustained power without heat soak.

Drivetrain: Upgraded 10L90E 10-speed transmission with a Sonnax billet valve body (PN: 10L90E-VB) and a PPE heavy-duty torque converter (3,200 RPM stall, triple-disc design). Reinforce the rear differential with an Eaton Detroit Truetrac LSD (PN: 913A580) and 4.10:1 gearing (Richmond Gear PN: 41-3081-1) for improved acceleration.

Suspension/Handling: Full KW Suspensions Clubsport coilover kit (3-way adjustable, 24-way rebound, 16-way compression) with custom valving for the Suburban’s 5,800 lb weight. Add a Hellwig 77180 sway bar (1.5" diameter) and poly bushings (Energy Suspension 3.5111G) to reduce body roll. Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers (PN: 1N3.9800.10) with 16.1" rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads for fade-resistant braking.
estetica: Body: Rocket Bunny widebody kit (Suburban-specific, PN: RB-SUB-001) with carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser. Paint in BASF Glasurit 90-Line ‘Midnight Purple’ with a 3-stage pearl finish. Add a custom hood scoop (Stillen 40-10000) for the supercharger intercooler.
Wheels: Forgeline GA3R 24x12" wheels (ET -12 offset) with Nitto NT05R 305/35R24 tires. Custom center caps with Z71 badging in anodized gold (Billet Specialties PN: 700001).

Interior: Full Recaro Pole Position seats (PN: 208050) with 6-point Schroth Profi II harnesses. Custom roll cage (Chassisworks 8.5-point bolt-in) with powder-coated ‘Titanium Gray’ finish. Add a Motec C127 dash display with integrated boost, AFR, and G-force readouts.
